data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending February 15 was 219,000, while the expected number was 215,000.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending February 15 was 219,000, which was expected to be 215,000. The previous value was revised from 213,000 to 214,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: FOX reporter: The US SEC is very interested in pledge
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Fox Business reporter Eleanor Terrett posted on the X platform that according to a source who recently spoke with the US SEC, the agency is very interested in pledges and even asked the industry to provide a memo detailing different types of pledges and their benefits. The source expects that the agency will issue some kind of guidance on pledges in the near future because it is a topic they are passionate about.

data.title: SEC Shows Interest In Staking, Guidance Expected Soon
data.description: According to Odaily, Fox Business journalist Eleanor Terrett reported on the X platform that a source recently in conversation with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) revealed the agency's keen interest in staking. The SEC has requested the industry to provide a memorandum detailing various types of staking and their benefits. The source anticipates that the SEC will soon issue guidance on staking, as it is a topic of significant interest to them.

data.title: Soneium launches 100 million ASTR community incentive campaign
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sony Layer2 project Soneium posted on the X platform that it will provide 100 million ASTR for community incentives.
The Astar Contribution Score (ACS) event will be launched on Soneium, aiming to promote on-chain adoption, expand the role of ASTR in Superchain, and reward ecosystem participation.
By interacting with dApps, participating in Web3 experiences, and contributing to network activities, users will earn ACS points, which will be redeemable for ASTR at the end of the event.

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Slightly Higher Than Expected
data.description: According to PANews, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending February 15 reached 219,000. This figure slightly exceeded the anticipated 215,000 claims. The previous week's data was revised from 213,000 to 214,000.

data.title: BTC Price Cycle Trend Aligns with Past Peaks, Suggesting Further Upside
data.description:
Bitcoin’s long-term holder Net Unrealized Profit/Loss data shows that Bitcoin’s market structure is perfectly aligned with previous cycle tops. According to historical trends, BTC price usually goes through an entire cycle market and peaks simultaneously with previous bull market highs. In past cycles, the NUPL metric, which measures how profitable long-term holders have been, has […]
The post...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/20/btc-price-cycle-trend-aligns-with-past-peaks-suggesting-further-upside/

data.title: Deep Dive: How Kelsier Ventures Profited $116M from $LIBRA and $MELANIA While Traders Lost Millions
data.description:
Onchain data shows 74,000 traders lost over $286M on $LIBRA, with 25 losing more than $1M each, while Kelsier Ventures pocketed $116M.
source: https://solanafloor.com/news/deep-dive-how-kelsier-ventures-profited-116-m-from-libra-and-melania-while-traders-lost-millions

data.title: Crypto app downloads in the UAE surge by 41% in 2024
data.description:
A recent research by AppsFlyer measuring installation and user trends for 49 of the most popular crypto apps found that the UAE saw a 41% year-on-year increase in crypto trading and management application installations. In 2024, the UAE saw 15 million crypto app downloads, with the most happening in the second half of the year. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-app-downloads-uae-surge-2024/

data.title: Strategy Announces Pricing of $2 Billion Convertible Senior Notes Offering
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin Magazine disclosed on the X platform that Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) announced the pricing of a $2 billion convertible senior notes offering to purchase more Bitcoin.

data.title: OpenAI Reaches 400 Million Weekly Active Users
data.description: According to PANews, CNBC has reported that as of February this year, OpenAI has achieved a milestone of 400 million weekly active users.
